revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id={{{id|R from alternative language}}}
  |name=[[:Category:Redirects from alternative languages|From an alternative language]]
  |from=a page name in {{#switch:{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}
              |art=an [[Constructed language|artificial language]]
              |bo=one of the [[Tibetan languages]]
              |und=an as-yet-[[undetermined language]]
              |#default={{#if:{{#invoke:lang|is_ietf_tag_frame|{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}}}
                        |{{#invoke:lang|name_from_tag|{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}|link=yes}}
                        |an as-yet-[[undetermined language]]}}}}
  |to=a page name in {{#switch:{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}
              |art=an [[Constructed language|artificial language]]
              |bo=one of the [[Tibetan languages]]
              |und=an as-yet-[[undetermined language]]
              |#default={{#if:{{#invoke:lang|is_ietf_tag_frame|{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}}}
                        |{{#invoke:lang|name_from_tag|{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}|link=yes}}
                        |an as-yet-[[undetermined language]]}}}}.  These words may directly translate or they may be related words, names or phrases
  |info=** This redirect leads to its target in accordance with the naming conventions for titles in other languages and can help writing and searches.  {{main other|However, per [[WP:NOTBROKEN]] do not replace these redirected links with a [[WP:piped link|piped link]].}}
  |printworthy={{main other|{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}|en|{{#ifeq:{{{printworthy}}}|no|no|yes}}}}}}
  |all category=<!--for automatic namespace detection-->
}}{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|testcases||{{#if:{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}
 | [[Category:Redirects from {{#ifexist:Category:Redirects from {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{1|{{{from|{{{lang|}}}}}}}}}}}-language terms
  | {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{1|{{{from|{{{lang|}}}}}}}}}}}
  | non-English
 }}-language terms]]
 | {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||[[Category:Redirects from undetermined-language terms]]
  }}
 }}{{#if:{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}
 | [[Category:Redirects to {{#ifexist:Category:Redirects to {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{2|{{{to}}}}}}}}-language terms
  | {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{2|{{{to}}}}}}}}
  | non-English
 }}-language terms]]
 | {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||[[Category:Redirects to undetermined-language terms]]}}
}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id={{{id|R from alternative language}}}
  |name=[[:Category:Redirects from alternative languages|From an alternative language]]
  |from=a page name in {{#switch:{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}
              |art=an [[Constructed language|artificial language]]
              |bo=one of the [[Tibetan languages]]
              |und=an as-yet-[[undetermined language]]
              |#default={{#if:{{#invoke:lang|is_ietf_tag_frame|{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}}}
                        |{{#invoke:lang|name_from_tag|{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}|link=yes}}
                        |an as-yet-[[undetermined language]]}}}}
  |to=a page name in {{#switch:{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}
              |art=an [[Constructed language|artificial language]]
              |bo=one of the [[Tibetan languages]]
              |und=an as-yet-[[undetermined language]]
              |#default={{#if:{{#invoke:lang|is_ietf_tag_frame|{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}}}
                        |{{#invoke:lang|name_from_tag|{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}|link=yes}}
                        |an as-yet-[[undetermined language]]}}}}.  These words may directly translate or they may be related words, names or phrases
  |info=** This redirect leads to its target in accordance with the naming conventions for titles in other languages and can help writing and searches.  {{main other|However, per [[WP:NOTBROKEN]] do not replace these redirected links with a [[WP:piped link|piped link]].}}
  |printworthy={{main other|{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}|en|{{#ifeq:{{{printworthy}}}|no|no|yes}}}}}}
  |all category=<!--for automatic namespace detection-->
}}{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|testcases||{{#if:{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}
 | [[Category:Redirects from {{#ifexist:Category:Redirects from {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{1|{{{from|{{{lang|}}}}}}}}}}}-language terms
  | {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{1|{{{from|{{{lang|}}}}}}}}}}}
  | non-English
 }}-language terms]]
 | {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||[[Category:Redirects from undetermined-language terms]]
  }}
 }}{{#if:{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}
 | [[Category:Redirects to {{#ifexist:Category:Redirects to {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{2|{{{to}}}}}}}}-language terms
  | {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{2|{{{to}}}}}}}}
  | non-English
 }}-language terms]]
 | {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||[[Category:Redirects to undetermined-language terms]]}}
}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id={{{id|R from alternative language}}}
  |name=[[:Category:Redirects from alternative languages|From an alternative language]]
  |from=a page name in {{#switch:{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}
              |art=an [[Constructed language|artificial language]]
              |bo=one of the [[Tibetan languages]]
              |und=an as-yet-[[:en:Undetermined language|Undetermined language]]
              |#default={{#if:{{#invoke:lang|is_ietf_tag_frame|{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}}}
                        |{{#invoke:lang|name_from_tag|{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}|link=yes}}
                        |an as-yet-[[:en:Undetermined language|Undetermined language]]}}}}
  |to=a page name in {{#switch:{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}
              |art=an [[Constructed language|artificial language]]
              |bo=one of the [[Tibetan languages]]
              |und=an as-yet-[[:en:Undetermined language|Undetermined language]]
              |#default={{#if:{{#invoke:lang|is_ietf_tag_frame|{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}}}
                        |{{#invoke:lang|name_from_tag|{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}|link=yes}}
                        |an as-yet-[[:en:Undetermined language|Undetermined language]]}}}}.  These words may directly translate or they may be related words, names or phrases
  |info=** This redirect leads to its target in accordance with the naming conventions for titles in other languages and can help writing and searches.  {{main other|However, per [[WP:NOTBROKEN]] do not replace these redirected links with a [[WP:piped link|piped link]].}}
  |printworthy={{main other|{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}|en|{{#ifeq:{{{printworthy}}}|no|no|yes}}}}}}
  |all category=<!--for automatic namespace detection-->
}}{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|testcases||{{#if:{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}
 | [[Category:Redirects from {{#ifexist:Category:Redirects from {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{1|{{{from|{{{lang|}}}}}}}}}}}-language terms
  | {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{1|{{{from|{{{lang|}}}}}}}}}}}
  | non-English
 }}-language terms]]
 | {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||[[Category:Redirects from undetermined-language terms]]
  }}
 }}{{#if:{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}
 | [[Category:Redirects to {{#ifexist:Category:Redirects to {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{2|{{{to}}}}}}}}-language terms
  | {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{2|{{{to}}}}}}}}
  | non-English
 }}-language terms]]
 | {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||[[Category:Redirects to undetermined-language terms]]}}
}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id={{{id|R from alternative language}}}
  |name=[[:Category:Redirects from alternative languages|From an alternative language]]
  |from=a page name in {{#switch:{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}
              |art=an [[Constructed language|artificial language]]
              |bo=one of the [[Tibetan languages]]
              |und=an as-yet-[[:en:Undetermined language|Undetermined language]]
              |#default={{#if:{{#invoke:lang|is_ietf_tag_frame|{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}}}
                        |{{#invoke:lang|name_from_tag|{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}|link=yes}}
                        |an as-yet-[[:en:Undetermined language|Undetermined language]]}}}}
  |to=a page name in {{#switch:{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}
              |art=an [[Constructed language|artificial language]]
              |bo=one of the [[Tibetan languages]]
              |und=an as-yet-[[:en:Undetermined language|Undetermined language]]
              |#default={{#if:{{#invoke:lang|is_ietf_tag_frame|{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}}}
                        |{{#invoke:lang|name_from_tag|{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}|link=yes}}
                        |an as-yet-[[:en:Undetermined language|Undetermined language]]}}}}.  These words may directly translate or they may be related words, names or phrases
  |info=** This redirect leads to its target in accordance with the naming conventions for titles in other languages and can help writing and searches.  {{main other|However, per [[WP:NOTBROKEN]] do not replace these redirected links with a [[WP:piped link|piped link]].}}
  |printworthy={{main other|{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}|en|{{#ifeq:{{{printworthy}}}|no|no|yes}}}}}}
  |all category=<!--for automatic namespace detection-->
}}{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|testcases||{{#if:{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}
 | [[Category:Redirects from {{#ifexist:Category:Redirects from {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{1|{{{from|{{{lang|}}}}}}}}}}}-language terms
  | {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{1|{{{from|{{{lang|}}}}}}}}}}}
  | non-English
 }}-language terms]]
 | {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||[[Category:Redirects from undetermined-language terms]]
  }}
 }}{{#if:{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}
 | [[Category:Redirects to {{#ifexist:Category:Redirects to {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{2|{{{to}}}}}}}}-language terms
  | {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{2|{{{to}}}}}}}}
  | non-English
 }}-language terms]]
 | {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||[[Category:Redirects to undetermined-language terms]]}}
}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id={{{id|R from alternative language}}}
  |name=[[:Category:Redirects from alternative languages|From an alternative language]]
  |from=a page name in {{#switch:{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}
              |art=an [[Constructed language|artificial language]]
              |bo=one of the [[Tibetan languages]]
              |und=an as-yet-[[:en:Undetermined language|Undetermined language]]
              |#default={{#if:{{#invoke:lang|is_ietf_tag_frame|{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}}}
                        |{{#invoke:lang|name_from_tag|{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}|link=yes}}
                        |an as-yet-[[:en:Undetermined language|Undetermined language]]}}}}
  |to=a page name in {{#switch:{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}
              |art=an [[Constructed language|artificial language]]
              |bo=one of the [[Tibetan languages]]
              |und=an as-yet-[[:en:Undetermined language|Undetermined language]]
              |#default={{#if:{{#invoke:lang|is_ietf_tag_frame|{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}}}
                        |{{#invoke:lang|name_from_tag|{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}|link=yes}}
                        |an as-yet-[[:en:Undetermined language|Undetermined language]]}}}}.  These words may directly translate or they may be related words, names or phrases
  |info=** This redirect leads to its target in accordance with the naming conventions for titles in other languages and can help writing and searches.  {{main other|However, per [[WP:NOTBROKEN]] do not replace these redirected links with a [[WP:piped link|piped link]].}}
  |printworthy={{main other|{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}|en|{{#ifeq:{{{printworthy}}}|no|no|yes}}}}}}
  |all category=<!--for automatic namespace detection-->
}}{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|testcases||{{#if:{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}
 | [[Category:Redirects from {{#ifexist:Category:Redirects from {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{1|{{{from|{{{lang|}}}}}}}}}}}-language terms
  | {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{1|{{{from|{{{lang|}}}}}}}}}}}
  | non-English
 }}-language terms]]
 | {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||[[Category:Redirects from undetermined-language terms]]
  }}
 }}{{#if:{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}
 | [[Category:Redirects to {{#ifexist:Category:Redirects to {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{2|{{{to}}}}}}}}-language terms
  | {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{2|{{{to}}}}}}}}
  | non-English
 }}-language terms]]
 | {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||[[Category:Redirects to undetermined-language terms]]}}
}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id={{{id|R from alternative language}}}
  |name=[[:Category:Redirects from alternative languages|From an alternative language]]
  |from=a page name in {{#switch:{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}
              |art=an [[Constructed language|artificial language]]
              |bo=one of the [[Tibetan languages]]
              |und=an as-yet-[[:en:Undetermined language|Undetermined language]]
              |#default={{#if:{{#invoke:lang|is_ietf_tag_frame|{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}}}
                        |{{#invoke:lang|name_from_tag|{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}|link=yes}}
                        |an as-yet-[[:en:Undetermined language|Undetermined language]]}}}}
  |to=a page name in {{#switch:{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}
              |art=an [[Constructed language|artificial language]]
              |bo=one of the [[Tibetan languages]]
              |und=an as-yet-[[:en:Undetermined language|Undetermined language]]
              |#default={{#if:{{#invoke:lang|is_ietf_tag_frame|{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}}}
                        |{{#invoke:lang|name_from_tag|{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}|link=yes}}
                        |an as-yet-[[:en:Undetermined language|Undetermined language]]}}}}.  These words may directly translate or they may be related words, names or phrases
  |info=** This redirect leads to its target in accordance with the naming conventions for titles in other languages and can help writing and searches.  {{main other|However, per [[WP:NOTBROKEN]] do not replace these redirected links with a [[WP:piped link|piped link]].}}
  |printworthy={{main other|{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}|en|{{#ifeq:{{{printworthy}}}|no|no|yes}}}}}}
  |all category=<!--for automatic namespace detection-->
}}{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|testcases||{{#if:{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}
 | [[Category:Redirects from {{#ifexist:Category:Redirects from {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{1|{{{from|{{{lang|}}}}}}}}}}}-language terms
  | {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{1|{{{from|{{{lang|}}}}}}}}}}}
  | non-English
 }}-language terms]]
 | {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||[[Category:Redirects from undetermined-language terms]]
  }}
 }}{{#if:{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}
 | [[Category:Redirects to {{#ifexist:Category:Redirects to {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{2|{{{to}}}}}}}}-language terms
  | {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{2|{{{to}}}}}}}}
  | non-English
 }}-language terms]]
 | {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||[[Category:Redirects to undetermined-language terms]]}}
}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id={{{id|R from alternative language}}}
  |name=[[:Category:Redirects from alternative languages|From an alternative language]]
  |from=a page name in {{#switch:{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}
              |art=an [[Constructed language|artificial language]]
              |bo=one of the [[Tibetan languages]]
              |und=an as-yet-[[:en:Undetermined language|Undetermined language]]
              |#default={{#if:{{#invoke:lang|is_ietf_tag_frame|{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}}}
                        |{{#invoke:lang|name_from_tag|{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}|link=yes}}
                        |an as-yet-[[:en:Undetermined language|Undetermined language]]}}}}
  |to=a page name in {{#switch:{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}
              |art=an [[Constructed language|artificial language]]
              |bo=one of the [[Tibetan languages]]
              |und=an as-yet-[[:en:Undetermined language|Undetermined language]]
              |#default={{#if:{{#invoke:lang|is_ietf_tag_frame|{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}}}
                        |{{#invoke:lang|name_from_tag|{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}|link=yes}}
                        |an as-yet-[[:en:Undetermined language|Undetermined language]]}}}}.  These words may directly translate or they may be related words, names or phrases
  |info=** This redirect leads to its target in accordance with the naming conventions for titles in other languages and can help writing and searches.  {{main other|However, per [[WP:NOTBROKEN]] do not replace these redirected links with a [[WP:piped link|piped link]].}}
  |printworthy={{main other|{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}|en|{{#ifeq:{{{printworthy}}}|no|no|yes}}}}}}
  |all category=<!--for automatic namespace detection-->
}}{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|testcases||{{#if:{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}
 | [[Category:Redirects from {{#ifexist:Category:Redirects from {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{1|{{{from|{{{lang|}}}}}}}}}}}-language terms
  | {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{1|{{{from|{{{lang|}}}}}}}}}}}
  | non-English
 }}-language terms]]
 | {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||[[Category:Redirects from undetermined-language terms]]
  }}
 }}{{#if:{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}
 | [[Category:Redirects to {{#ifexist:Category:Redirects to {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{2|{{{to}}}}}}}}-language terms
  | {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{2|{{{to}}}}}}}}
  | non-English
 }}-language terms]]
 | {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||[[Category:Redirects to undetermined-language terms]]}}
}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 5 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id={{{id|R from alternative language}}}
  |name=[[:Category:Redirects from alternative languages|From an alternative language]]
  |from=a page name in {{#switch:{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}
              |art=an [[Constructed language|artificial language]]
              |bo=one of the [[Tibetan languages]]
              |und=an as-yet-[[:en:Undetermined language|Undetermined language]]
              |#default={{#if:{{#invoke:lang|is_ietf_tag_frame|{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}}}
                        |{{#invoke:lang|name_from_tag|{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}|link=yes}}
                        |an as-yet-[[:en:Undetermined language|Undetermined language]]}}}}
  |to=a page name in {{#switch:{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}
              |art=an [[Constructed language|artificial language]]
              |bo=one of the [[Tibetan languages]]
              |und=an as-yet-[[:en:Undetermined language|Undetermined language]]
              |#default={{#if:{{#invoke:lang|is_ietf_tag_frame|{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}}}
                        |{{#invoke:lang|name_from_tag|{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}|link=yes}}
                        |an as-yet-[[:en:Undetermined language|Undetermined language]]}}}}.  These words may directly translate or they may be related words, names or phrases
  |info=** This redirect leads to its target in accordance with the naming conventions for titles in other languages and can help writing and searches.  {{main other|However, per [[WP:NOTBROKEN]] do not replace these redirected links with a [[WP:piped link|piped link]].}}
  |printworthy={{main other|{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}|en|{{#ifeq:{{{printworthy}}}|no|no|yes}}}}}}
  |all category=<!--for automatic namespace detection-->
}}{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|testcases||{{#if:{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}
 |  | {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||  }}
 }}{{#if:{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}
 |  | {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||}}
}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
</noinclude>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Redirects from {{#ifexist:Category:Redirects from {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{1|{{{from|{{{lang|}}}}}}}}}}}-language terms
  | {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{1|{{{from|{{{lang|}}}}}}}}}}}
  | non-English
 }}-language terms]]
[[Category:Redirects from undetermined-language terms]]
[[Category:Redirects to {{#ifexist:Category:Redirects to {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{2|{{{to}}}}}}}}-language terms
  | {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{2|{{{to}}}}}}}}
  | non-English
 }}-language terms]]
[[Category:Redirects to undetermined-language terms]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id={{{id|R from alternative language}}}
  |name=[[:Category:Redirects from alternative languages|From an alternative language]]
  |from=a page name in {{#switch:{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}
              |art=an [[Constructed language|artificial language]]
              |bo=one of the [[Tibetan languages]]
              |und=an as-yet-[[:en:Undetermined language|Undetermined language]]
              |#default={{#if:{{#invoke:lang|is_ietf_tag_frame|{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}}}
                        |{{#invoke:lang|name_from_tag|{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}|link=yes}}
                        |an as-yet-[[:en:Undetermined language|Undetermined language]]}}}}
  |to=a page name in {{#switch:{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}
              |art=an [[Constructed language|artificial language]]
              |bo=one of the [[Tibetan languages]]
              |und=an as-yet-[[:en:Undetermined language|Undetermined language]]
              |#default={{#if:{{#invoke:lang|is_ietf_tag_frame|{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}}}
                        |{{#invoke:lang|name_from_tag|{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}|link=yes}}
                        |an as-yet-[[:en:Undetermined language|Undetermined language]]}}}}.  These words may directly translate or they may be related words, names or phrases
  |info=** This redirect leads to its target in accordance with the naming conventions for titles in other languages and can help writing and searches.  {{main other|However, per [[WP:NOTBROKEN]] do not replace these redirected links with a [[WP:piped link|piped link]].}}
  |printworthy={{main other|{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}|en|{{#ifeq:{{{printworthy}}}|no|no|yes}}}}}}
  |all category=<!--for automatic namespace detection-->
}}{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|testcases||{{#if:{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}
 |  | {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||  }}
 }}{{#if:{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}
 |  | {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||}}
}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

[[Category:Redirects from {{#ifexist:Category:Redirects from {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{1|{{{from|{{{lang|}}}}}}}}}}}-language terms
  | {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{1|{{{from|{{{lang|}}}}}}}}}}}
  | non-English
 }}-language terms]]
[[Category:Redirects from undetermined-language terms]]
[[Category:Redirects to {{#ifexist:Category:Redirects to {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{2|{{{to}}}}}}}}-language terms
  | {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{2|{{{to}}}}}}}}
  | non-English
 }}-language terms]]
[[Category:Redirects to undetermined-language terms]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id={{{id|R from alternative language}}}
  |name=[[:Category:Redirects from alternative languages|From an alternative language]]
  |from=a page name in {{#switch:{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}
              |art=an [[Constructed language|artificial language]]
              |bo=one of the [[Tibetan languages]]
              |und=an as-yet-[[:en:Undetermined language|Undetermined language]]
              |#default={{#if:{{#invoke:lang|is_ietf_tag_frame|{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}}}
                        |{{#invoke:lang|name_from_tag|{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}|link=yes}}
                        |an as-yet-[[:en:Undetermined language|Undetermined language]]}}}}
  |to=a page name in {{#switch:{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}
              |art=an [[Constructed language|artificial language]]
              |bo=one of the [[Tibetan languages]]
              |und=an as-yet-[[:en:Undetermined language|Undetermined language]]
              |#default={{#if:{{#invoke:lang|is_ietf_tag_frame|{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}}}
                        |{{#invoke:lang|name_from_tag|{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}|link=yes}}
                        |an as-yet-[[:en:Undetermined language|Undetermined language]]}}}}.  These words may directly translate or they may be related words, names or phrases
  |info=** This redirect leads to its target in accordance with the naming conventions for titles in other languages and can help writing and searches.  {{main other|However, per [[WP:NOTBROKEN]] do not replace these redirected links with a [[WP:piped link|piped link]].}}
  |printworthy={{main other|{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}|en|{{#ifeq:{{{printworthy}}}|no|no|yes}}}}}}
  |all category=
}}{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|testcases||{{#if:{{{1|}}}{{{from|}}}{{{lang|}}}
 |  | {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||  }}
 }}{{#if:{{{2|}}}{{{to|}}}
 |  | {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||}}
}}
}}<noinclude>

{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

[[Category:Redirects from {{#ifexist:Category:Redirects from {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{1|{{{from|{{{lang|}}}}}}}}}}}-language terms
  | {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{1|{{{from|{{{lang|}}}}}}}}}}}
  | non-English
 }}-language terms]]
[[Category:Redirects from undetermined-language terms]]
[[Category:Redirects to {{#ifexist:Category:Redirects to {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{2|{{{to}}}}}}}}-language terms
  | {{#invoke:Lang|name_from_tag|{{{2|{{{to}}}}}}}}
  | non-English
 }}-language terms]]
[[Category:Redirects to undetermined-language terms]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
